title: ALTER TABLE MOVE without ONLINE — exclusive lock for entire table reorganization
expected_feedback: Critical: ALTER TABLE MOVE without ONLINE holds an exclusive lock for the entire table rewrite on 30M rows — blocking all DML for the full duration, which could be minutes to hours. DDL_LOCK_TIMEOUT is set (good), but the real problem is the operation itself: on 19c EE, ALTER TABLE MOVE ONLINE is available and holds only a brief exclusive lock at start and end, allowing concurrent DML during the rewrite. Additionally, non-online MOVE renders all indexes UNUSABLE (ORA-01502 on subsequent queries), whereas ONLINE MOVE maintains indexes automatically. For Standard Edition without ONLINE, use DBMS_REDEFINITION or CTAS+swap instead.
violated_rule: Large table restructuring uses DBMS_REDEFINITION or CTAS
